original_text: NVIDIA Corporation operates as a provider of graphics, compute, and networking solutions across the United States, Taiwan, China, and internationally [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The company generates revenue through two primary segments: Graphics and Compute & Networking [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The Graphics segment offers GeForce GPUs for gaming and PCs, GeForce NOW game streaming service, Quadro/NVIDIA RTX GPUs for enterprise workstation graphics, vGPU software for cloud-based visual computing, automotive platforms for infotainment systems, and Omniverse software for 3D designs [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The Compute & Networking segment provides Data Center platforms and systems for AI, HPC, and accelerated computing, Mellanox networking and interconnect solutions, automotive AI Cockpit, autonomous driving solutions, and NVIDIA AI Enterprise software [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The company sells to original equipment manufacturers, system builders, cloud service providers, automotive manufacturers, and other ecosystem participants [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. NVIDIA reported a gross margin of 56.93% and an operating margin of 15.66% for the fiscal year [fa1892bc-aa54-4657-b161-d3604764ec70, 3ffe9f64-65dd-443d-900d-ba16f3a72e7d].
revised_text: NVIDIA Corporation provides graphics, and compute and networking solutions in the United States, Taiwan, China, and internationally [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The company's Graphics segment offers GeForce GPUs for gaming and PCs, the GeForce NOW game streaming service and related infrastructure, and solutions for gaming platforms; Quadro/NVIDIA RTX GPUs for enterprise workstation graphics; vGPU software for cloud-based visual and virtual computing; automotive platforms for infotainment systems; and Omniverse software [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. NVIDIA reported a gross margin of 56.93% and an operating margin of 15.66% for the fiscal year [fa1892bc-aa54-4657-b161-d3604764ec70, 3ffe9f64-65dd-443d-900d-ba16f3a72e7d].
changes_summary: Removed unsupported details regarding the Compute & Networking segment offerings (Mellanox, AI Cockpit, etc.) as the cited chunk is truncated and does not contain this information. Removed the claim about customer types (OEMs, system builders, etc.) as it was not supported by the cited chunk. Trimmed the Graphics segment description to match the exact text available in the chunk (removed '3D designs' after Omniverse software). Retained financial metrics as they are supported by valid calculation IDs.
